title: Wellhouse 16cm Nonstick Saucepan with Lid Induction Small Granite Saucepan Saute Pan Sauce Pot Small Cooking Pot for Electric Gas & Induction Hobs
features: The Wellhouse Nonstick Sauce Pan is made of aluminum, free from PFOS/PFOA, ensuring safe and healthy cooking. The stay cool handle provides a comfortable touch feeling and secure grip.

Versatile Cooking Performance: This small saucepan is perfect for making sauces, boiling water, reheating, and cooking various ingredients like pasta, vegetables, and potatoes. The induction milk pot design allows for efficient heat distribution on all stove surfaces, including induction, electric, halogen, ceramic, and gas stoves

Easy to Clean and Maintain: The non-stick surface of this small pot makes cleaning a breeze. Simply wipe it with a damp cloth or rinse with water, minimizing water waste and saving you time and effort
Premium Quality Construction: Crafted with a high magnetic stainless steel base, this sauce pot ensures durability and stability, making it a reliable addition to your kitchen cookware collection
